The paper aims to discuss these issues.<\/jats:p><\/jats:sec><jats:sec><jats:title content-type=\"abstract-heading\">Design\/methodology\/approach<\/jats:title><jats:p>\u2013 This system works by capturing reflected light from different colored patches by digital camera and with the knowledge of spectral power distribution of light source and defined observer, reflection of each sample can be reproduced. By fixing the light source, the position of the detector would be eliminated to four angles of observation.<\/jats:p><\/jats:sec><jats:sec><jats:title content-type=\"abstract-heading\">Findings<\/jats:title><jats:p>\u2013 This method can achieve acceptable reconstruction accuracy for metallic samples. This approach confirmed repeatability and practicality of the simple imaging acquisition to replace spectral reflectance measurement devices in different viewing angles.<\/jats:p><\/jats:sec><jats:sec><jats:title content-type=\"abstract-heading\">Originality\/value<\/jats:title><jats:p>\u2013 The reflectance of metallic samples has been measured at several angles such as 20\u00b0, 45\u00b0, 75\u00b0 and 110\u00b0 from specular reflection. A simple system was used to measure multi-angle reflectance of metallic surfaces by digital camera. By suggested system can be measured the reflectance without contact and limitation in the shape of surfaces. This method achieved acceptable reconstruction accuracy for metallic samples. This simple imaging acquisition is comparable with goniospectrophotometer for measuring multi-angle reflectance of metallic samples.<\/jats:p><\/jats:sec>","DOI":"10.1108\/sr-02-2012-618","type":"journal-article","created":{"date-parts":[[2014,1,7]],"date-time":"2014-01-07T07:20:56Z","timestamp":1389079256000},"page":"89-97","source":"Crossref","is-referenced-by-count":3,"title":["Recovering spectral data of metallic paints at various observation angles by digital camera"],"prefix":"10.1108","volume":"34","author":[{"given":"Mahshid","family":"Montazeri","sequence":"first","affiliation":[],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]},{"given":"Ali","family":"Shams Nateri","sequence":"additional","affiliation":[],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]},{"given":"Keivan","family":"Ansari","sequence":"additional","affiliation":[],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]}],"member":"140","reference":[{"key":"key2021010322135805800_b1","doi-asserted-by":"crossref","unstructured":"Abed, F.M. , Amirshahi, S.H. and Abed, M.R.M.
